behavior_summary: This script implements the NPC Malchir's interaction, test/ceremony sequence, and escalation to hostility. It responds to look, use, area enter/leave, scheduled ticks, and spell-U8P_MALCHIR::cast events aimed at Malchir.

MALCHIR::cast (Event 11) inspects the global progress flag MalchirTest: before the final phase it searches the caster/context for matching items and destroys them (spawning a followup handler for each); when MalchirTest >= 6 it immediately escalates (sets malchirMad and spawns a combat/spell-combo handler).

MALCHIR::use handles player interaction: toggles Malchir's gump, records first meeting (malchirMet), may spawn the test-start sequence (MALCHIR::03F2) or the anger/attack routine (MALCHIR::090D), and avoids behavior if Malchir is dead or already in a daemon scene.

The test-start routine MALCHIR::03F2 plays music, barks instructions, sets MalchirTest to begin the multi-step acolyte test, and spawns FIRESPEL effects; MALCHIR::09F2 later initiates a daemon-summoning cinematic (putting the avatar in stasis and spawning effects), guarded by inDaemonScene.

malchirMad is an escalation counter used to track warning/anger state; inDaemonScene prevents reentrance to the staged ceremony; malchirMet records that the player has met Malchir to avoid repeat introductory speech.
notable_control_flow: Event-driven: distinct handlers for look, use, schedule, enterFastArea, leaveFastArea, and U8P_MALCHIR::cast drive discrete behaviors.

State-guarded flows: many handlers first check Npc::isDead and relevant global flags (MalchirTest, inDaemonScene, malchirMet, malchirMad) to decide between dialog, starting the test, staging a ceremony, or becoming hostile.

MALCHIR::cast branches sharply on MalchirTest: if MalchirTest < 6 it performs an inventory/world-item iteration + destruction loop; if >= 6 it sets malchirMad and delegates to SPELCMBT::084D (spell-combat handler).

Cinematic/spawn orchestration: MALCHIR::03F2 and MALCHIR::09F2 spawn FIRESPEL and METHOD processes, use playMusic and setAvatarInStasis, and set inDaemonScene to serialize the scene and prevent re-entry.
open_questions: Exact matching criteria used by MALCHIR::cast when scanning and destroying items (which item fields/shapes/frames are matched) — disassembly shows checks but exact constants/shape IDs are not fully named.
Precise behaviors of spawned METHOD routines (METHOD::143A, 133F, 15E7, 0BCF, 1090, 034B) beyond 'animation/timed behavior' — their full effects are engine-level and inferred from usage.
Whether MALCHIR::034B is a separate, persistent handler with additional logic (it is spawned after item destruction) — its content wasn't fully enumerated in the extracted summary.

main_function.name: U8P_MALCHIR::cast
main_function.purpose: Handle spells U8P_MALCHIR::cast at Malchir, route behavior based on the player's test progress (MalchirTest). Before the final test phase it consumes matching items from the caster/context and spawns followups; at/after the final phase it escalates to hostility and defers to a spell-combat handler.
entry_conditions: Event 11 (U8P_MALCHIR::cast) targeted at the Malchir NPC/object
Triggered when an external U8P_MALCHIR::cast/spell event supplies a pid/context (caller) and target context (BP+06h)

function_map.name: U8P_MALCHIR::cast
function_map.role: Main U8P_MALCHIR::cast event handler: routes U8P_MALCHIR::cast events based on MalchirTest, item iteration and destruction, and escalation to combat handlers.

function_map.name: U8P_MALCHIR::look
function_map.role: Produce descriptive text when a player looks at Malchir; chooses strings based on malchirName, malchirJob, and death state.

function_map.name: U8P_MALCHIR::schedule
function_map.role: Periodic scheduler that spawns METHOD tasks for repeating behavior if Malchir is alive and not in the daemon scene.

function_map.name: U8P_MALCHIR::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Fast-area entry trigger: sets targets for avatarMasterSorcerer or spawns a quick reaction METHOD when someone enters Malchir's fast area.

function_map.name: U8P_MALCHIR::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Fast-area exit cleanup: frees/cleans resources/processes created on entry.

function_map.name: U8P_MALCHIR::use
function_map.role: Handle user 'use' (open/interact): toggles UI gump, records first meeting (malchirMet), may start the test (spawn MALCHIR::03F2) or escalate to anger (MALCHIR::090D).

function_map.name: U8P_MALCHIR::03F2
function_map.role: Start the acolyte test: play music, deliver dialog, set MalchirTest = 1, spawn FIRESPEL effects and helper processes to orchestrate the multi-step test.

function_map.name: U8P_MALCHIR::090D
function_map.role: Anger/escalation: remove certain nearby items, bark insults, set malchirMad to maximum hostile value, and set Malchir's target to the player (begin attack behavior).

function_map.name: U8P_MALCHIR::09F2
function_map.role: Initiate the daemon-summoning ceremony: put avatar into stasis, set inDaemonScene, and spawn FIRESPEL and METHOD effects arranged around Malchir.

function_map.name: U8P_MALCHIR::034B
function_map.role: Followup handler spawned by MALCHIR::cast for each destroyed matching item (appears to process consequences of destruction).

internal_calls.purpose: Spawned for each destroyed item as a followup handler to process consequences of item removal during pre-final-test casts.
Spawn the test-start orchestration on first/appropriate use interactions to begin the acolyte test.
Spawn the anger/escalation routine when conditions indicate hostility (e.g., MalchirTest >= 6 or repeated provocations).
Sequence/coordinate: the test orchestration spawns or transitions to the daemon-scene starter when the test advances to its cinematic phase (inDaemonScene set).
Spawn a quick reaction METHOD when non-avatar actors enter the fast area (method id inferred from usage).

external_calls.purpose: Remove matching items found in the caster/context during pre-final-test U8P_MALCHIR::cast handling.
Delegate combined spell-combat handling when MalchirTest >= 6 (final/hostile phase).
Emit descriptive text to the viewer when the player looks at Malchir.
Play a mood-setting music track when the acolyte test begins.
Freeze the player avatar to stage the daemon-summoning cinematic.
Spawn fire-spell effects/projectiles used as part of the test or ceremony.
Assign Malchir's combat/AI target (usually the avatar) when escalating to hostility or focusing actions.
Decide whether to open or close Malchir's UI gump on player use.
Open the NPC's interaction gump when appropriate.
Close the NPC's interaction gump when toggling off.
Set Malchir's target to the avatar when avatarMasterSorcerer is true and entry occurs.
Free/cleanup resources created on fast-area entry when an actor leaves.
Spawn scheduled/timed behavior tasks to animate or update the NPC periodically.
Deliver hostile dialog/insults during escalation to anger.
Compute positions for spawning FIRESPEL effects around Malchir during the ceremony.
Compute positions for spawning FIRESPEL effects around Malchir during the ceremony.
Compute vertical offsets for spawning FIRESPEL effects around Malchir during the ceremony.

reads.name: MalchirTest
reads.likely_effect: Drive branching for U8P_MALCHIR::cast behavior and multi-step test progression (read to determine whether to consume items or escalate to combat).

reads.name: malchirName
reads.likely_effect: Control whether the NPC is referred to by full name/title in look() barks.

reads.name: malchirJob
reads.likely_effect: Control job/title strings included in look() barks (e.g., 'Master Sorcerer' vs 'mage').

reads.name: malchirMet
reads.likely_effect: Used to decide whether to play introductory test dialog and avoid repeating meeting dialog.

reads.name: inDaemonScene
reads.likely_effect: Guard to prevent starting the daemon-summoning ceremony or duplicate scheduled spawns while the cinematic is active.

reads.name: avatarMasterSorcerer
reads.likely_effect: Used to rapidly engage the avatar as the NPC's target on fast-area entry when set.

reads.name: malchirMad
reads.likely_effect: Read to decide escalation level and alter behavior/dialog depending on how angry Malchir currently is.

writes.name: malchirMad
writes.likely_effect: Set or increment to reflect increasing anger; certain handlers set it to 3 to indicate full hostility and trigger attack behavior.

writes.name: malchirMet
writes.likely_effect: Set to true the first time a player properly uses Malchir to prevent repeated introductory dialog.

writes.name: MalchirTest
writes.likely_effect: Initialized/advanced by MALCHIR::03F2 to begin the acolyte test and subsequently read to drive the test state machine.

writes.name: inDaemonScene
writes.likely_effect: Set to true when the daemon-summoning ceremony begins to block additional starts and alter scheduled behavior.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the NPC Malchir's interaction, test/ceremony sequence, and escalation to hostility. It responds to look, use, area enter/leave, scheduled ticks, and spell-U8P_MALCHIR::cast events aimed at Malchir.
